definition.title: Ad Clips Master Repository
definition.objective: Centralized grab-and-go social inventory. This folder alone can support 60-90 days of structured posting without producing a single new asset.
definition.target_audience: Anj (primary user for deployment), Geoffrey (for inventory tracking), all social platforms
definition.cadence: Evergreen Inventory Pool. When generating a 90-day calendar: Pull 30-40% from here. Mix with new releases. Use to fill f

campaign_card.target_audience: Anj (primary user for deployment), Geoffrey (for inventory tracking), all social platforms
key_messages: 60-90 days of structured posting from existing inventory alone
Pre-approved, brand-aligned, safe to reuse content library
Pull 30-40% of any 90-day calendar from this repository

_legacy_card.description: Master archive of all finished ad clips and short-form content created by LHS to date. The first place Anj should look when she needs quick social content, is behind on post quotas, wants to build a mini-campaign fast, needs repurposing material, or wants to reference prior messaging.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Centralized grab-and-go social inventory. This folder alone can support 60-90 days of structured posting without producing a single new asset.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Quick social content when behind on quotas. Mini-campaign builder (5-day themed pushes). Repurposing source for carousels, quote graphics, micro clips. Throwback Authority posts. LinkedIn vs IG differentiation. Educational playlist campaigns.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Cut into 15-second hooks. Turn into carousel quote graphics. Extract single-stat micro clips. Use as Throwback Authority posts. Create themed mini-series. Build educational playlist campaign. Clip differently for LinkedIn vs IG.
_legacy_card.timeline: Evergreen Inventory Pool. When generating a 90-day calendar: Pull 30-40% from here. Mix with new releases. Use to fill flagged production gaps.
